title: achyronia vermiculata
intro:
Achyronia vermiculata, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a type of tropical vine in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Achyronia vermiculata include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, can be made by boiling the leaves and stems in water to release its medicinal compounds.
